# Category: cloud_monitoring

  "$schema": "http://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2014-04-01-preview/deploymentTemplate.json",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2017-08-01",
      "name": "webapp",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId(variables('armid').appService.serverFarm.resourceGroup, variables('armid').appService.serverFarm.name)]"
      }
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2017-08-03",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "name": "[concat(variables('armid').webapp.name, '/appsettings')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId(variables('armid').webapp.resourceGroup, variables('armid').webapp.name)]"
      ],
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "WEBSITE_USE_RECOVERY_SERVER": true,
        "ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT": "Production",
        "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME": "dotnet",
        "ApplicationInsightsAgent_EXTENSION_VERSION": "~2"
      }
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2015-08-01",
      "name": "[variables('armid').db.sql.name]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId(variables('armid').db.resourceGroup, variables('armid').db.sql.name)]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('adminUser')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2017-04-30",
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "name": "[variables('armid').db.sql.name]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId(variables('armid').db.resourceGroup, variables('armid').db.sql.name)]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "Storage",
      "properties": {}
    }
  ]
}
